personalInfo.title: Fullstack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Building elegant interfaces and robust APIs with clean code and performance in mind.
bio: Fullstack developer with a passion for creating high-impact digital experiences. Specialized in React, Node.js and TypeScript, focused on scalable architecture and clean code.
When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies, contributing to open source or reading about distributed systems design.

saas-dashboard.title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
saas-dashboard.description: Analytics platform with real-time visualizations, authentication and multitenancy.
saas-dashboard.longDescription: Full-featured dashboard with interactive charts using Recharts, JWT authentication, team management and PDF report exports.

ecommerce-api.title: E-commerce API
ecommerce-api.description: Complete RESTful API for e-commerce with payments, inventory and notifications.

design-system.title: Design System
design-system.description: React component library with Storybook, tests and automatic documentation.

task-manager.title: Task Manager App
task-manager.description: Task management app with drag & drop, filters and real-time collaboration.

cli-tool.title: Dev CLI Tool
cli-tool.description: CLI tool for automating development workflows with project scaffolding.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal portfolio built with React, TypeScript and TailwindCSS with a Dark Minimal theme.

exp-1.description: Technical lead for a team of 4 developers, responsible for the architecture and delivery of a B2B SaaS with 500+ active companies.
highlights: Reduced load time by 60% with code splitting and lazy loading
Migrated the monolith to a microservices architecture
Implemented full CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions + Docker

exp-2.description: Development of the startup's core product — an online education platform focused on UX and performance.
highlights: Built the design system from scratch with React + Storybook
Improved accessibility score from 60 to 95 (WCAG AA)
Implemented internationalization for PT, EN and ES

exp-3.description: Development of landing pages and small web systems for various clients.
highlights: Delivered more than 15 landing page projects
Learned React and Node.js in production
Direct collaboration with designers and clients
